title: ドント・タッチ・メカニズム

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The apple-flavored ice cream I stored in the
refrigerator to cool down and replenish my
energy has completely melted.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...The refrigerator is silent. No operational sounds
detected. I have concluded that it is
malfunctioning.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Action must be taken in times of dormitory
trouble. Shifting priorities to report to dorm
leader.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My energy levels are low, so I will attempt to call
the dorm leader using a telecommunication
device.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Third instance this week of a telecommunication
device breaking down confirmed.

The repeated technical problems of all the
electronics around her causes Bourbon to become
both physically and mentally exhausted.
